tasks.subject: Task 1: Soft-spot contract — machine-readable soft-spots.tsv
tasks.description: validator emits SOFTSPOT<TAB>slug<TAB>claim<TAB>reason (verbatim claim); audit-stack persists dev/audit/soft-spots.tsv and renders report.md. Files: agents/validator.md, skills/audit-stack/SKILL.md.

tasks.subject: Task 2: enrichment-findings gate shape + bats
tasks.description: assert-structure.sh enrichment-findings case + tests/assert-structure.bats coverage (valid/malformed/empty). Verify: bats tests/assert-structure.bats.

tasks.subject: Task 3: enrichment agent
tasks.description: agents/enrichment.md — per-gap web acquisition, four verdicts, output KIND<TAB>gap_id<TAB>slug<TAB>source_ref<TAB>url<TAB>tier<TAB>title<TAB>quote, 3 examples.

tasks.subject: Task 4: enrich-stack skill
tasks.description: skills/enrich-stack/SKILL.md — gate (soft-spots.tsv) → stale-check → CAP=12 dispatch + gate-batch enrichment-findings → aggregate+URL-dedup → operator approval → stage-with-reverify (bold-field header) → report. No auto-catalog/commit.
